description: Held-out evaluation set for anchora — questions the LoRA adapter was NOT trained on. Same corpus and language convention as golden.json (English questions, Portuguese corpus and reference answers), but every case asks about a DIFFERENT fact, so it measures generalization rather than memorization. Includes out-of-corpus cases (answerable=false) whose correct behavior is to abstain with the exact refusal sentence. Never feed this file to build_finetune_dataset.py.
abstention_sentence: I could not find this information in the provided documents.

cases.question: What is the general rule regarding publicity versus secrecy of public information?
cases.reference_answer: A regra geral é a publicidade; o sigilo é a exceção.

cases.question: For how many years is access to personal information about privacy and intimacy restricted?
cases.reference_answer: 100 anos, independentemente de classificação.

cases.question: How many days does a civil servant have to enter into exercise after taking office?
cases.reference_answer: 15 dias contados da data da posse.

cases.question: What is the maximum length of a suspension penalty for a federal civil servant?
cases.reference_answer: Não pode exceder 90 dias.

cases.question: How many vacation days per year is a federal civil servant entitled to?
cases.reference_answer: 30 dias por ano, podendo ser parcelados em até três períodos.

cases.question: What guarantees do Public Defenders enjoy in their career?
cases.reference_answer: Independência funcional, inamovibilidade, irredutibilidade de vencimentos e estabilidade.

cases.question: What kind of institution is the Public Defender's Office under the Constitution?
cases.reference_answer: Instituição permanente, essencial à função jurisdicional do Estado.

cases.question: What is the stated objective of the LGPD?
cases.reference_answer: Proteger os direitos fundamentais de liberdade e de privacidade.

cases.question: What is the role of the data protection officer (encarregado/DPO) under the LGPD?
cases.reference_answer: É o canal de comunicação entre o controlador, os titulares e a ANPD.

cases.question: Name some of the legal bases that authorize the processing of personal data under the LGPD.
cases.reference_answer: Consentimento do titular, cumprimento de obrigação legal, execução de políticas públicas, exercício regular de direitos e legítimo interesse do controlador.

cases.question: What is the deadline to file an appeal (apelação) under the new CPC?
cases.reference_answer: 15 dias úteis.

cases.question: What is the deadline for motions for clarification (embargos de declaração)?
cases.reference_answer: 5 dias úteis.

cases.question: During which period are procedural deadlines suspended for the forensic recess?
cases.reference_answer: Entre 20 de dezembro e 20 de janeiro.

cases.question: Which previous law did Law 14.133/2021 replace?
When does the qualification (habilitação) phase generally occur under the new Procurement Law?
cases.reference_answer: Em regra, após o julgamento das propostas, invertendo a ordem tradicional.

cases.question: Through which procedures may direct contracting occur under the Procurement Law?
cases.reference_answer: Por dispensa ou inexigibilidade de licitação, nas hipóteses previstas em lei.

cases.question: To which authority is the administrative appeal addressed under Law 9.784?
cases.reference_answer: À autoridade que proferiu a decisão, que poderá reconsiderar ou encaminhar à autoridade superior.

cases.question: Which law regulates the administrative process within the federal public administration?
cases.reference_answer: A Lei nº 9.784, de 29 de janeiro de 1999.

cases.question: Which appeal lies against a decision that denies the free justice benefit?
cases.reference_answer: Agravo de instrumento.

cases.question: Can a legal entity (pessoa jurídica) be granted the free justice benefit?
cases.reference_answer: Sim, pessoa jurídica brasileira ou estrangeira com insuficiência de recursos.

cases.question: Is access to public information free of charge under the LAI?
cases.reference_answer: Sim, salvo o custo de reprodução de documentos.

cases.question: What is the regular working schedule of a federal civil servant?
cases.reference_answer: Até 8 horas diárias e 40 horas semanais.
